address.address1: Jl. Takengon-Bintang, Desa Teluk One-One, Aceh Tengah, Aceh, 24519 Indonesia�

description.short: Perched near Lake Laut Tawar on a cool volcanic plateau, Portola Grand Renggali Hotel Takengon is a calm base for two travelers exploring coffee plantations, waterfalls and highland villages. Enjoy private, convenient check-in/out, 24-hour room service and an acclaimed on-site restaurant set in tranquil gardens. Air-conditioned rooms include plush towels, premium toiletries and complimentary bottled water; select rooms offer lake or sweeping mountain and ocean views—ideal for two travelers seeking comfort and easy access to Takengon’s scenic highlights. comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Dear Bapak/Ibu Muci yang terhormat, Salam Hangat dari Portola Grand Renggali Hotel. Terima kasih telah meluangkan waktu untuk menulis ulasan berharga tentang pengalaman menginap bapak/ibu di Portola grand Renggali Hotel. Sangat menyenangkan mengetahui bahwa bapak/ibu senang selama menginap di tempat kami. Kami berharap segera memiliki kesempatan lagi menyambut kedatangan Bapak/Ibu di Portola Grand Renggali Hotel. Salam Hormat Manajemen
comments.reviewComments: Staying at Portola Grand Renggali Hotel Takengon was truly a satisfying experience. We booked a room with a view that directly faces Lake Lut Tawar. In the morning, the hotel's large window can also be used for sunbathing since the room offers a view of the sunrise. The hotel restaurant also provides a varied menu, and the breakfast is complete with a buffet. The service is friendly, the food is delicious, and the restaurant's atmosphere directly overlooks the lake, perfect for deep talks with your partner and simply unwinding while enjoying the fresh air of Takengon - Suci Fajarni.
comments.originalComment: Menginap di Portola Grand Renggali Hotel Takengon benar-benar pengalaman yg memuaskan. Kami memesan kamar dgn view yg mengarah langsung ke Danau Lut Tawar. Di pagi hari, jendela kamar hotel yg cukup besar bs sekaligus dimanfaatkan untuk berjemur mengingat kamar tsb juga menawarkan pemandangan sunrise. Restoran hotel ini juga menyediakan menu yg bervariasi, sarapan jg lengkap dan buffet. Pelayanannya ramah, makanannya enak, dan suasana restonya jg langsung mengarah ke danau, cocok buat deep talk bersama pasangan, dan untuk sekadar melepas penat sambil menikmati udara segar Takengon - Suci Fajarni

comments.reviewComments: The perfect place for a vacation and to find peace away from the city. Located close to the city center, Hotel Renggali provides you with privacy and beauty that pleases the eye. The service is OK, customer service has a fast response, and cleanliness can be improved further.
comments.originalComment: Tempat yang tepat untuk liburan dan mencari ketenangan dari kota. Berjarak cukup dekat dari pusat kota, Hotel Renggali cukup memberikan anda privasi dan keindahan yang memanjakan mata. Pelayanan OK, CS fast response, fasilitas mumpuni kebersihan bisa ditingkatkan kembali.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I am personally very satisfied with the economical price, yet the service and room facilities are very, very good. The price is economical, but the facilities are like those of a star-rated hotel. I will continue to use Portola Ringgali every time I go to Takengon.
comments.originalComment: Saya pribadi sangat puas dengan harga yang ekonomis namun pelayanan dan fasilitas kamar yang sangat sangat baik. Harga ekonomis tetapi fasilitas sudah seperti hotel berbintang. Saya akan terus menggunakan portola ringgali setiap saya ke Takengon.

comments.reviewComments: The place is clean, perfectly located by the lake, you can fish, and exercise along the lakeside at the hotel location, the prayer room is comfortable, the breakfast area is right by the lake with a beautiful view of the lake, the breakfast menu is standard five-star, delicious, and has a lot of variety, you can have espresso for 25k at the lakeside cafe while chatting in the evening. I want to come here again, especially if I get a discount voucher from the hotel owner, haha...
comments.originalComment: Tempat nya bersih, lokasi pas ditepi danau, bisa mancing, bisa olahraga disepanjang pinggiran danau di lokasi hotel, mushola nya nyaman, tempat sarapan pas ditepi danau dengan pemandangan danau yg sangat cantik, menu sarapan standart bintang lima enak dan banyak variasinya, bisa ngopi expresso 25k di caffe tepi danau sambil ngobrol dimalam hari. Pengen kesini lagi apalagi kalau di kasi voucher diskon sama yg punya hotel ha ha ha...

comments.reviewComments: This hotel has a great location with a beautiful view of the Lake Tawar. I stayed 2 nights in room 301 during the New Year holiday 2024/2025. Management needs to check the staff's work, including the toilets! Although this hotel is quite grand... I am sure that if the staff's performance is improved quickly, this hotel will remain the best choice in Takengon!

comments.reviewComments:
I'm surprised by those giving bad ratings (what do you expect)??? I booked via AGODA and got a cheap price of Rp.350,200 on April 19, 2024:

✅ Initially, I was hesitant because of many bad reviews on Google. However, upon arrival, the service was = POLITE + FRIENDLY (I purposely tested different staff) and everyone still smiled amicably, not raising their voices.

✅ LAKE VIEW, premium queen size bed (not a substandard one), dacron pillows, granite floors, large wardrobe 👍

✅ The room was clean, equipped with a Panasonic air conditioner, 3 towels, soap, toothbrush, water heater shower, plates, glasses, spoons, sugar, coffee, tea, comb, (all available) 👍

✅ SUPER NICE VIEW, many heavenly spots for kids and young people 👍

✅ An elevator is available (for those who are lazy/tired of climbing stairs). The room uses a Key Card system.

✅ Got ALL YOU CAN EAT breakfast buffet (Delicious) with a view of Lake Lut Tawar 👍

✅ NO HORROR or haunting, don’t let your minds wander too much.

✅ The weather was quite cool. We arrived when the weather was 18-20 degrees.

✅ The location is easy to find, spacious parking (not steep), friendly for the elderly & children.

✅ Located by the lake but also close to the city (easy to find other food options).

All this was obtained for Rp.350,200/night (Rating 100/10 👍💯)
comments.originalComment:
Saya heran sama yg kasih rating jelek (what do u expect)??? Saya booking via AGODA dapat harga murah Rp.350.200 pada tgl 19.04.2024 :

✅ Awalnya sempat ragu karna banyak bad review di google. Namun ketika datang Pelayanan Service = SOPAN + RAMAH (sengaja saya test ke staf2 berbeda) dan semuanya tetap senyum ramah, gak naik tensi

✅ VIEW DANAU, Bed queen size premium (bukan abal2), Bantal dacron, lantai granit, lemari besar 👍 

✅ Kamar bersih ber AC panasonic, 3 handuk, sabun sikat gigi, water heater shower, piring gelas sendok gula kopi teh, kaca sisir (semua tersedia) 👍

✅ VIEW SUPER BAGUS, banyak titik spot surgawi utk anak alay + cabe2an 👍

✅ Tersedia lift (bagi yg malas/capek naik tangga). Kamar sudah pakai sistem Key Card 

✅ Dapat BREAKFAST ALL U CAN EAT prasmanan sepuasnya (Lezat) dengan View Danau Lut Tawar 👍

✅ NO HORROR atau berhantu, jangan aneh2 lah pikiran klen ya

I am surprised by those who give bad ratings (what do you expect)??? I booked via AGODA and got a cheap price of Rp.350,200 on 19.04.2024:

✅ At first, I was hesitant because of the many bad reviews on Google. However, when I arrived, the service was = POLITE + FRIENDLY (I deliberately tested different staff) and they all remained smiling and friendly, not raising their voices.

✅ LAKE VIEW, premium queen size bed (not a cheap one), dacron pillows, granite floor, large closet 👍

✅ The room is clean with a Panasonic air conditioner, 3 towels, toothbrush soap, shower water heater, plates, glasses, spoons, sugar, coffee, tea, comb mirror (all available) 👍

✅ SUPER GREAT VIEW, many heavenly spots for young people + spicy foods 👍

✅ There is an elevator (for those who are lazy/tired to climb stairs). The room already uses a Key Card system.

✅ You get ALL YOU CAN EAT breakfast buffet (delicious) with a view of Lake Lut Tawar 👍

✅ NO HORROR or haunted, don’t think weirdly, please.

✅ The weather is quite cool. We came when it was 18-20 degrees.

✅ The location is easy to find, spacious parking (not steep), friendly for the elderly & children.

✅ The location is by the lake but also close to the city (easy to find other food options).

All of this was obtained for the price of Rp.350,200/night (Value 100/10 👍💯)
